smart_query: Axis AI technology review metrics analysis

analysis.summary: Технологиите на изкуствения интелект продължават да се развиват, но със скандали като Grammarly и проблемите с банковите апликации. Тези проблеми показват нуждата от устойчиви и надеждни решения. Целта за устойчива цивилизация изисква грижливо проектирани технологии.
key_developments: Grammarly pulls AI author-impersonation tool after backlash
Lloyds, Bank of Scotland and Halifax apps showed customers other users' transactions
analysis.scientific_frontier: COMIC: Agentic Sketch Comedy Generation, LiTo: Surface Light Field Tokenization
analysis.relevance_to_goal: Технологиите трябва да бъдат разработени с цел да повишат достойнството и благополучието на всички хора, съгласно целта за устойчива цивилизация.

arxiv_papers.title: COMIC: Agentic Sketch Comedy Generation
arxiv_papers.snippet: We propose a fully automated AI system that produces short comedic videos similar to sketch shows such as Saturday Night Live. Starting with character references, the system employs a population of agents loosely based on real production studio roles, structured to optimize the quality and diversity

arxiv_papers.title: LiTo: Surface Light Field Tokenization
arxiv_papers.snippet: We propose a 3D latent representation that jointly models object geometry and view-dependent appearance. Most prior works focus on either reconstructing 3D geometry or predicting view-independent diffuse appearance, and thus struggle to capture realistic view-dependent effects. Our approach leverage
